title: Lylla
content:
{{Character |image = Lylla on floor infobox.png |real name = 89Q12 (subject name)
Lylla |species = [[Halfworlder]] (Evolved {{WPS|Otter}}) |gender = Female |DOD = [[2000s]]-[[2010s|Early 2010s]]{{Ref|GotGV3}} |affiliation = [[Batch 89]] |movie = ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'' (mentioned)
''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]'' |actor = [[Linda Cardellini]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|89Q12, it's not really a name. So, I would like my name to be... Lylla.|Lylla|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Subject '''89Q12''' was an otter that was genetically and cybernetically augmented by [[High Evolutionary]]. Taking on the name '''Lylla''', she was a member of [[Batch 89]], along with [[Teefs]], [[Floor]] and [[Rocket]]. Lylla believed that they would be allowed to reside on [[Counter-Earth]] only to be informed by Rocket that High Evolutionary intended to kill them all. She rejoiced as she was freed by Rocket before she was swiftly killed by High Evolutionary, much to the horror of Rocket, while Teefs and Floor were killed shortly after. [[2026|Several years later]], Rocket, nearing death, saw his three friends in a vision. In it, Lylla advised and motivated him to continue living before Rocket was resuscitated by the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. ==Biography== {{Expand}} ===Genetic Experiment=== {{Quote|It really is good to have friends.|Lylla|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Like the other experiments in [[Batch 89]], 89Q12 was genetically modified by [[High Evolutionary]] to have increased intelligence for an Otter, and she was given artificial limbs to stand upright. She formed a strong bond with the other members of Batch 89, especially with the new member to the group: [[89P13]]. Eventually she and her friends came up with real names for themselves other than their given number with 89Q12 deciding on Lylla.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ===Escape and Death=== One day after Rocket returned from a meeting with the High Evolutionary after the latter had a fit of delirium, Lylla was informed of the High Evolutionary's actual plan to incinerate all of Batch 89 but Rocket to preserve his brain for study. Rocket was able to Jury Rig a keycard for the door to their cage and briefly freed Batch 89. Lylla and Rocket embraced each other outside of the cage before Lylla was fatally shot in the back by the High Evolutionary, much to the horror of Rocket. {{Ref|GotGV3}} ===Legacy=== ====Remembered by Rocket==== Lylla's death and by extension the rest of Batch 89 filled Rocket with grief and was a catalyst for his pessimistic and cynical nature, with him flying into a rage and mutilating High Evolutionary's face to such a high degree the latter required a mask to cover the injuries.{{Ref|GotGV3}} After Rocket joined the intergalactic community, his association with Lylla became listed on his [[Nova Corps]] file.{{Ref|GotG}} Several years later, when Rocket had a near death experience, he had a vision during which he saw Lylla. When he tearfully apologized to Lylla for getting her and their friends killed, Lylla, showing no animosity, spoke of how much her and the rest of Batch 89 enjoyed the [[Astral Dimension|afterlife]] and being able to fly in the sky, with Teefs and Floor appearing to agree. Rocket asked to come with them, but Lylla told him that it was not his time yet and that he still had a purpose in life, before they shared a kiss where Rocket's cybernetics were deactivated, allowing critical medical treatment to be applied to him, leading to him being revived.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ==Powers== *'''Halfworlder Physiology''': Lylla is a cybernetically augmented otter. Her enhancements include two cybernetic arms and a genetically augmented cerebral cortex. **'''Enhanced Intelligence''': Lylla could talk and communicate with other species, as well as perform complex tasks, unlike other members of her species. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Batch 89]] - Friends **[[Rocket Raccoon]] - Love Interest **[[Teefs]] † **[[Floor]] † {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[OrgoCorp]] **[[High Evolutionary]] - Experimenter and Killer **[[Theel]] † **[[Vim]] † {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Lylla is an otter from the same planet as [[Rocket Raccoon]] and is his love interest. ==References== {{Gallery|Lylla/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} [[es:Lylla]] [[ru:Лилла]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3 Characters]] [[Category:Halfworlders]] [[Category:Cyborgs]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:White Hair]] [[Category:Black Eyes]] [[Category:Batch 89 Members]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by High Evolutionary]]
